title: Home Direct Rectangular Oilcloth PVC Wipe Clean Tablecloth 140cm x 200cm 55x78 Leaves Sage Green
features: Wipe clean tablecloth, no need to wash or iron
Protect your table and work surfaces from accidental food and drinks spills
Suitable for indoor and outdoor use
Oilcloths are perfect for kitchen&dining tables, especially if you have children
description: Product Description KEY FEATURES AND BENEFITS Waterproof & Stain-Resistant No need to panic over spills. Our PVC material blocks moisture and messes, keeping your table clean and dry. Easy to Maintain Cleaning is as easy as a swipe. Just use a damp cloth or sponge—no washing, no drying, no hassle. Built to Last Made from tear-resistant PVC, our tablecloths withstand daily use, making them a dependable choice for homes with kids or pets. Stays Put, Stays Neat The weight and texture of our tablecloth help it stay in place, reducing slips and the need for constant readjustment. Previous page Next page Is this tablecloth machine washable? No, our Home Direct Tablecloths PVC tablecloths are designed for easy wipe-clean maintenance. Simply wipe spills with a damp cloth or sponge. Machine washing is not recommended. Can this tablecloth be used outdoors? Yes, absolutely! Our durable PVC material is perfect for both indoor and outdoor use, making it ideal for patios, picnics, and garden parties. Does it have a strong plastic smell? While new PVC products may have a faint initial scent, it typically dissipates quickly after unrolling and airing out for a short period. We recommend unrolling it a few hours before first use. How do I remove creases from the tablecloth? For light creases, simply lay the tablecloth flat for a day or two. For more stubborn creases, you can gently warm the back (non-printed side) with a hairdryer on a low setting, or place it in indirect sunlight for a short time. What if I need a custom size? Currently, we offer the standard sizes listed.
